name: 3-Day Tour: Agadir → Ait Ben Haddou → Merzouga → Marrakech (or Fes)

seo.title: 3-Day Agadir to Merzouga Tour — Ait Ben Haddou, Ouarzazate, Erg Chebbi | Authentic Morocco Tours
seo.description: Private 3-day tour from Agadir: Ait Ben Haddou (UNESCO), Ouarzazate, Dades Gorges, Merzouga desert (Erg Chebbi), ending in Marrakech or Fes.

hero.tagline: Agadir → Sahara → Marrakech: the great South in 3 days

intro: This 3-day tour from Agadir reveals the iconic landscapes of southern Morocco: the UNESCO-listed ksar of Ait Ben Haddou, the film studios of Ouarzazate, the Dades Gorges and the golden dunes of Erg Chebbi in Merzouga. The tour can end in Marrakech or Fes depending on your itinerary.
